displayTitle: X-Wing Rogue Squadron #13: The Warrior Princess, Part 1
synopsis: The squadron's roster has contained Corellian heroes and Alderaanian fighter aces, but when the royal court of Eiattu 6 comes to reclaim their princess from the ranks of Rogue Squadron, it's a surprise to everyone... especially the princess!
title: X-Wing Rogue Squadron #13: The Warrior Princess, Part 1
